subtitle.en: Greetings, self-introduction, and the basic question-answer rhythm.

milestone.en: Can greet someone, introduce yourself with name / country / profession, and answer the basic 'where are you from?' / 'what do you do?' questions.

vocabulary.note: Countries and cities for 'where are you from?' answers.

grammar.note: The de/het split. You will get this wrong — that's fine, defaulting to 'de' is right ~75% of the time.
Skim the basic rule; we'll go deeper in Module 5.
